error.capacity_details: esengeli na %d bits, capacité maximale na k=1 ezali %d bits
error.empty_coefficients: slice ya coefficient ekoki kozala vide te
error.empty_password: mot de passe ekoki kozala pamba te
error.header_embed_failed: elongi te kokɔtisa motó ya nsango: %v
error.insufficient_capacity: message munene mingi pona capacité ya coefficient oyo ezali
error.insufficient_coefficients: ba coefficients ekoki te na tango ya intégration: esengeli %d, azui %d
error.insufficient_header_coefficients: ba coefficients oyo ekoki kosalelama ekoki te mpo na kokɔtisa motó: esengeli na bits 32, ezwami kaka %d coefficients oyo ekoki kosalelama
error.invalid_code_word: liloba ya code ekoki kozala mpamba te
error.invalid_coefficient_range: motuya ya coefficient libanda ya intervalle ya valide (-2048 kino 2047)
error.invalid_k_parameter: paramètre k esengeli kozala kati ya 1 na 8
error.matrix_encode_failed: encodage ya matrice elongi te mpo na liloba ya code: %v
error.message_too_large: bonene ya nsango eleki oyo epesami nzela (8.388.607 octets)
error.nil_random_source: source aléatoire ekoki kozala nil te: salela InitializePRNG(mot de passe) to pesa RandomSource oyo ezwami liboso
error.permutation_failed: elongi te kobimisa permutation ya coefficient : %v

log.capacity_calculated: Capacité ya coefficient oyo e calculer
